description_long: This is a large, menacing hammer with a rectangular, double-sided head that appears to be constructed from heavy, stone-like material, heavily stained with red, possibly to simulate blood. The head is reinforced with dark metal bands and bolts, giving it a brutal, reinforced look. The handle is long, straight, and made of dark metal, featuring a spiked, textured grip section just below the head for added intimidation and grip security. The hammer's head is thick and blocky, with sharp, angular edges and a rugged, battle-worn surface. The overall design is aggressive and utilitarian, suggesting use in a fantasy or post-apocalyptic urban setting. The coloration is dominated by dark grays, blacks, and deep reds, enhancing its ominous appearance.
description: A large, double-sided, blood-stained hammer with a reinforced stone head and a long, spiked metal handle. The design is aggressive and rugged, with dark and red coloration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular hammer head with heavy red stains on the right side and visible metal bands.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the double-sided head, both faces stained and reinforced, and the spiked grip section below the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back face of the hammer head, less stained but still rugged and reinforced.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the other striking face, with visible stains and the spiked grip section.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, dark metal handle with a spiked, textured grip section below the head for enhanced grip and intimidation.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, rectangular sledge-type head made of stone, reinforced with metal bands and bolts, with both striking faces heavily stained and rugged.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Heavy red stains, scratches, and rugged surface texture visible on the head; no rust or major dents.
